hero.heading: Design that clears the noise and carries the message.
hero.subheading: I create visual identities, digital experiences and communication systems that turn complex ideas into clear and memorable design.

capabilities.title: Brand & Visual Design
capabilities.description: Identity systems, logo directions and brand assets built to stay consistent across every touchpoint.

capabilities.title: Social Media Campaigns
capabilities.description: Scroll-friendly creatives, carousels and campaign visuals shaped for attention and clarity.

capabilities.title: UI/UX Design
capabilities.description: Website and product interfaces designed around usability, hierarchy and confident user flow.

capabilities.title: Presentation Design
capabilities.description: Investor decks, pitch presentations and event slides that stay clean and confident under scrutiny.

capabilities.title: Print & Marketing Design
capabilities.description: Brochures, flyers, standees and print collateral engineered for real-world production.

capabilities.title: Video & Motion Graphics
capabilities.description: Edits and short-form motion that give ideas rhythm, movement and a strong visual close.

about_preview.heading: Engineer's structure. Designer's eye.
about_preview.body: I came into design from Mechanical Engineering, and that background still shapes how I work — I break a problem down, understand the structure, then design around it. Over six years of creative practice across agencies and in-house teams, and a UI/UX course completed in June 2024, have pushed me deeper into digital product thinking. The result is work that balances creativity, structure, curiosity and practical problem-solving.

final_cta.heading: Have a project worth building well?
final_cta.body: Whether you're a founder, a marketing team or an agency, I'd love to hear what you're working on.
